questionHtml:
What is the function of control rods in a nuclear power plant?

 

A.   To slow neutrons down

B.   To regulate fuel supply

C.   To exchange thermal energy

D.   To regulate the reaction rate

meta.title: What is the function of control rods in a nuclear power plant? A. To slow neutrons down B. To regulate fuel supply C. To exchange thermal energy D. To regulate the reaction rate
